instructions.summary: Create a Mastodon account for VerdeDesk distribution — no karma gates, posts indexed by Google.
instructions.detail: Mastodon has no karma requirements, no algorithmic suppression, and posts are indexed by Google. Hashtags like #DigitalNomad #Portugal #Expat have active communities. Unlike Twitter (Zernio exhausted) and Reddit (spam-filtered), Mastodon allows unlimited posting from day one.
instructions.exact_action:
Takes ~2 minutes:

1. Go to mastodon.social/auth/sign_up
2. Sign up with carlos.gaspar2011@gmail.com
3. Share credentials: echo 'export MASTODON_USER="..." MASTODON_PASS="..."' >> ~/.founder-secrets
4. Go to Preferences > Development > New Application to create an API access token
5. Add: echo 'export MASTODON_TOKEN="..."' >> ~/.founder-secrets
instructions.unblocks: Agent can post guide links with #DigitalNomad #Portugal #FreelancerTax hashtags. No rate limits, no karma gates. Posts are Google-indexed.
